positive: A vintage botanical diagram illustration of an imaginary, exotic flower (like a Moon Orchid or Star Lily). The style must mimic old scientific textbook engravings, using fine cross-hatching, detailed labels (without actual text), and muted, aged paper tones. Highly detailed, scientific illustration, etching style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern art, cartoon, vibrant colors
